homePage.title: 四葉社会保険労務士法人
homePage.metaDescription: Social insurance & labor insurance procedures, work rules creation, subsidy applications, and labor consulting. 四葉パートナーズ's labor consulting firm provides comprehensive HR and labor support for businesses.
homePage.heroDescription1: From social insurance and labor insurance procedures to work rules, subsidy applications, and labor consulting.
homePage.oneStopDescription2: We never pass your concerns from one office to another.
homePage.oneStopDescription1: Real estate, administrative scrivener, and labor consultant working together.
homePage.representativeTitle: Certified Social Insurance and Labor Consultant (Sharoushi)　第202500525号
homePage.representativeBio2: We receive many inquiries about employing foreign nationals. By coordinating with our administrative scrivener office (residence status) and real estate division (company housing search), we can provide one-stop support from hiring to retention — a key strength of the 四葉 group.
homePage.oneStopTitle: The Advantage of the 四葉 Group
homePage.representativeBio1: The most important element in business management is people. Creating an environment where employees can work with peace of mind supports business growth. From social insurance and labor insurance procedures to work rules and subsidy utilization, we provide broad support for corporate HR and labor matters.

groupBusinesses.name: 四葉社会保険労務士法人

homePage.heroDescription2: Comprehensive support for all your business challenges related to people.

services.title: Social Insurance & Labor Insurance Procedures
services.description: We accurately handle complex insurance procedures such as enrollment/withdrawal notifications, standard remuneration assessments, and annual updates, reducing the burden on business owners.

services.title: Subsidy Applications
services.description: We support applications for subsidies available to businesses, such as the Career Advancement Subsidy and the Work-Life Balance Support Subsidy. In coordination with our administrative scrivener office, we also cover other grants.

services.title: Work Rules & Internal Regulations
services.description: We create and review work rules that match your company's actual situation. We also provide ongoing support for compliance with legal amendments.

services.title: Payroll Processing
services.description: We accurately handle monthly payroll calculations, from social insurance premiums, income tax, and resident tax calculations to payslip preparation.

services.title: Labor Consulting
services.description: We address day-to-day labor issues including employee disputes, harassment prevention, and work-style reform compliance.

services.title: Labor Audits & Compliance
services.description: We handle responses to labor standards bureau inspections and provide labor compliance reviews and improvement recommendations.

faq.question: What are the benefits of hiring a labor consultant?
faq.answer: We accurately handle specialized HR and labor tasks including social insurance and labor insurance procedures, work rules creation and review, and subsidy applications. We reduce the burden on business owners while ensuring legal compliance.

faq.question: Can you help with employing foreign nationals?
faq.answer: Yes, we handle social insurance procedures and labor management for foreign employees. In coordination with our group's administrative scrivener office (residence status) and real estate division (company housing search), we provide one-stop support from hiring to retention.

faq.question: Do you also support subsidy applications?
faq.answer: Yes, we support applications for various subsidies available to businesses, including the Career Advancement Subsidy and the Work-Life Balance Support Subsidy. In coordination with our administrative scrivener office, we also cover other grants.

homePage.ctaDescription: Social insurance, work rules, subsidies — feel free to ask about anything.

aboutPage.representativeBio2: The incorporation of the labor consulting firm is currently in preparation, but we are accepting social insurance and labor consultations under 四葉パートナーズ. We are also committed to supporting the employment of foreign nationals, in coordination with our administrative scrivener office and real estate division.

legal.description: Subsidies & grants, residence status & visas, legal procedures
legal.name: 四葉行政書士事務所

homePage.ctaDescription: Subsidies, grants, visa applications, company formation — feel free to ask about anything.
homePage.oneStopTitle: The Advantage of the 四葉 Group
homePage.heroDescription2: With our one-stop real estate and legal services, we support your business and daily life.
homePage.representativeBio1: Drawing on the investigative and writing skills honed as a newspaper journalist, I handle a wide range of services from subsidy applications to permit procedures. Subsidy and grant applications in particular depend on how well you convey your business plan — and my journalism background produces persuasive applications.

groupBusinesses.name: 四葉社会保険労務士法人

services.description: We support everything from document preparation to approval for subsidies such as the Business Restructuring Subsidy and the Small Business Sustainability Subsidy. We have the expertise to maximize your approval rate.
services.title: Subsidies & Grants
Residence Status & Visa Applications
services.description: We support the preparation of documents needed to obtain, renew, or change residence statuses, including work visas, business manager visas, and spouse visas. With 5-language support, we can communicate directly with foreign applicants.

We support incorporation procedures for stock companies (KK) and limited liability companies (GK). From articles of incorporation to registration procedures, we offer a one-stop service combined with real estate (office search). Registration is handled by our partner judicial scrivener.
services.title: Company & Corporation Formation

services.description: We support the acquisition of permits required for your business, including construction business permits, restaurant business permits, and secondhand dealer permits.
services.title: Various Permit Applications
Inheritance, Wills & Trust Support
services.description: We support all aspects of inheritance procedures, including will preparation, estate division agreements, and civil trust (family trust) design. Real estate inheritance is handled in coordination with 四葉不動産.
We prepare and review various contracts, draft certified mail, and create other legal documents required for your business.
services.title: Contracts & Document Preparation

faq.question: What are the benefits of hiring an administrative scrivener for subsidy applications?
faq.answer: We leverage the writing skills of a former journalist to create persuasive applications. For subsidy applications where how you present your business plan is key to approval, journalism experience is a significant advantage.

Yes, we handle the acquisition, renewal, and change of various residence statuses including work visas, business manager visas, and spouse visas. With 5-language support, we can communicate directly with the foreign applicant.
faq.question: Do you handle visa applications for foreign nationals?
Can I consult about both real estate and legal matters at the same time?
faq.answer: Yes. Within the 四葉パートナーズ group, the real estate division (四葉不動産) and the administrative scrivener office work together, so we can handle things like office lease contracts and company formation procedures in one place.

homePage.oneStopDescription1: Real estate, administrative scrivener, and labor consultant working together.
homePage.representativeTitle: Chief Administrative Scrivener (Gyoseishoshi)　Registration No.: 第25087022号
homePage.representativeBio2: Additionally, with experience living in 5 countries and multilingual capabilities, I have particular strength in residence status and visa applications for foreign nationals. The ability to provide a one-stop solution combining real estate (四葉不動産) and legal services is our office's greatest advantage.

message.title: 四葉不動産 Representative
message.paragraph2: When you have a real estate concern, I want to be someone you can talk to easily. Whether it's buying, selling, renting, or property management — no question is too small. Walking alongside each client to find the best answer together. That is the promise of 四葉不動産.
message.paragraph1: As a newspaper journalist, I traveled the world and lived in 5 countries. The information-gathering skills, negotiation expertise, and broad network I built along the way — I am convinced these are powerful assets in the real estate world as well.

faq.question: What services does 四葉不動産 offer?
faq.answer: We offer four services: rental support, sales support, property management, and multilingual support (Japanese, English, Chinese Traditional/Simplified).

faq.question: Can foreigners rent an apartment?
faq.answer: Yes. 四葉不動産 provides specialized support for international residents in 5 languages. Our representative has lived in 5 countries and understands the challenges of finding housing as a foreigner.
We primarily cover Bunkyo-ku, Tokyo, and offer properties throughout all 23 wards of Tokyo. Our nearest station is Myogadani on the Tokyo Metro Marunouchi Line.
